label: Sequence
code:
actor User
participant App
participant Server
participant DB

User -> App: Request
App -> Server: API Call
Server -> DB: Query
DB --> Server: Result
Server --> App: Response
App --> User: Display

label: Class
UseCase
code:
left to right direction
actor User
rectangle System {
  usecase "Login" as UC1
  usecase "View Dashboard" as UC2
  usecase "Edit Profile" as UC3
}
User --> UC1
User --> UC2
User --> UC3

label: State
code:
[*] --> Idle
Idle --> Processing : Start
Processing --> Success : OK
Processing --> Error : Fail
Success --> [*]
Error --> Idle : Retry

label: ER
code:
entity User {
  *id : int <<PK>>
  --
  name : varchar
  email : varchar
}
entity Order {
  *id : int <<PK>>
  --
  *user_id : int <<FK>>
  order_date : date
  total : decimal
}
entity Product {
  *id : int <<PK>>
  --
  name : varchar
  price : decimal
}
entity OrderItem {
  *id : int <<PK>>
  --
  *order_id : int <<FK>>
  *product_id : int <<FK>>
  quantity : int
}
User ||--o{ Order
Order ||--|{ OrderItem
Product ||--o{ OrderItem

label: Activity
Swimlane
Mindmap
code:
@startmindmap
* Project
** Planning
*** Requirements
*** Schedule
** Development
*** Frontend
*** Backend
*** Database
** Testing
*** Unit Test
*** E2E Test
@endmindmap

label: WBS
code:
@startwbs
* Project
** Phase 1
*** Task 1.1
*** Task 1.2
** Phase 2
*** Task 2.1
*** Task 2.2
*** Task 2.3
** Phase 3
*** Task 3.1
@endwbs

label: YAML
code:
@startyaml
project:
  name: MyApp
  version: 1.0
services:
  web:
    image: nginx
    ports:
      - 80:80
  api:
    image: node
    ports:
      - 3000:3000
  db:
    image: postgres
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: mydb
@endyaml

label: Component
code:
package "Frontend" {
  [Web App] as WA
  [Mobile App] as MA
}
package "Backend" {
  [API Gateway] as GW
  [Auth Service] as Auth
  [User Service] as US
  [Order Service] as OS
}
package "Data" {
  database "PostgreSQL" as DB
  database "Redis" as Cache
}
WA --> GW
MA --> GW
GW --> Auth
GW --> US
GW --> OS
US --> DB
OS --> DB
Auth --> Cache

label: Deployment
